creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hm, we have a problem.  Is there any way to get the port to build with a 
different version of PostgreSQL?  The 8.2 port has been removed due to 
upstream EOL.  The PostgreSQL support looks optional, can we disable it? 
By the way, to depend on postgresql-server ports you should use 
USE_PGSQL=server.
